title: castilleja trujillensis
intro: Castilleja trujillensis, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. Native to the western United States and Canada, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Castilleja trujillensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Castilleja trujillensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic properties.
